# 🔐 Password Strength Analyzer

A modern web application that evaluates password strength and provides actionable feedback to improve security. Built using Flask and the zxcvbn library.

---

## 🌐 Live Demo

👉 https://your-render-link.onrender.com

---

## 🚀 Features

* 🔍 Real-time password strength analysis
* 📊 Strength classification (Very Weak → Very Strong)
* 💡 Smart suggestions to improve password security
* 🔁 Auto-generated strong password alternatives
* 🎨 Clean and responsive UI with visual strength indicator

---

## 🛠 Tech Stack

* **Backend:** Python (Flask)
* **Frontend:** HTML, CSS, JavaScript
* **Library:** zxcvbn (password strength estimation)
* **Deployment:** Render

---

## ⚙️ How It Works

1. User enters a password
2. Backend processes it using zxcvbn
3. Returns:

   * Strength score
   * Feedback & suggestions
   * Estimated crack time
4. UI displays results dynamically

---

## ▶️ Run Locally

```bash
git clone https://github.com/YOUR-USERNAME/password-strength-analyzer.git
cd password-strength-analyzer
pip install -r requirements.txt
python app.py
```

Then open:
http://127.0.0.1:5000
